RocketFuel Blockchain, Inc. expects record growth in Q1-Q3 2024 with increased revenue and expanding customer base.
news.summary: In San Francisco, California, a decentralized payment solutions provider, RocketFuel Blockchain, Inc. (OTC: RKFL), revealed their anticipated revenue report for the initial three quarters of 2024. The company, serving globally with payment options through FIAT, Bitcoin, and various cryptocurrencies, has seen notable growth. This progress is evidenced by rising revenue figures and an enlarging clientele base.

Natural Grocers closing Tucson store at Broadway/Kolb corner on Dec 11, 2024. Closing sales start on Dec 3.
news.summary: A Tucson, AZ store of Natural Grocers® in Lakewood, Colo., is set to close on December 11, 2024, located at the intersection of Broadway Boulevard and Kolb Road. The company will commence store-closing sales starting December 3.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin drop as US gov't transfers $2B BTC. BTC at $95,870.15 (-1.56%), ETH at $3,641.51 (-1.58%), DOGE at $0.4231 (-4.99%). $1.92B BTC from Silk Road moved, causing FUD and $600 million in liquidations. BTC dip to $94,600, 19,800 BTCs moved.
news.summary: Cryptocurrencies went through a correction after the U.S. government transferred almost $2 billion in Bitcoin to new addresses. Bitcoin's price dropped to $94,600 as 19,800 BTCs, worth $1.92 billion, were moved from an address connected to the U.S. government, initially linked to the Silk Road online black market. Around 10,000 BTCs ($963 million) from this were transferred to Coinbase. Ethereum also dipped below $3,600 due to FUD but saw a recovery. The market correction led to approximately $600 million in liquidations in 24 hours, including $425 million in bullish bets.

Three papers from Mitsubishi Electric researchers accepted to NeurIPS2024. MERL center leading a workshop.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO:6503) revealed that three papers from its Information Technology R&D Center and Mitsubishi Electric Research Laboratories, Inc. have been accepted for the Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2024. The R&D Center is based in Kamakura City, Kanagawa Prefecture, while the subsidiary is situated in Cambridge, Massachusetts. Moreover, MERL is spearheading the coordination of a workshop at the conference.

Opportunity Knocks wins "Best Feel Good Show" at Reality TV Awards, beating top shows. Dec. 2, 2024. (Character count: 99)
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Los Angeles, Opportunity Knocks' surprising win as the Best Feel Good Show marked a triumphant moment. The series' Cinderella nomination led to an underdog victory over popular network shows like The Voice, Shark Tank, and American Ninja Warrior. This remarkable achievement showcased the show's rising success in the industry.

news.headline: XRP meme coins such as ARMY are surging as XRP reaches 7-year highs, up 400% this week on Ripple's ledger.
news.summary: Cryptocurrencies inspired by memes, such as those on the XRP Ledger, are experiencing a significant surge in value. In particular, XRP, which is associated with Ripple, has reached its highest value in seven years. The coin has seen a remarkable increase of over 400% in value just this week.

Neusoft Medical Systems presents AI-powered medical imaging solutions at RSNA 2024 in Chicago.
news.summary: Neusoft Medical Systems Co., Ltd., a prominent provider of medical imaging solutions and services worldwide, has confirmed its involvement in the Radiological Society of North America (RSNA) 2024 Annual Meeting in Chicago on December 2. This renowned event is expected to gather thousands of industry professionals and experts to discuss the latest trends and innovations in the field of radiology. Neusoft Medical Systems will be showcasing its cutting-edge technologies, including advanced imaging equipment and software, aimed at revolutionizing patient care. This participation highlights the company's commitment to advancing healthcare and fostering collaborations within the medical community.

news.headline: Sonic Labs to launch public layer-1 blockchain soon! Users can swap FTM tokens for "S" tokens at 1:1 ratio.
news.summary: A new blockchain called Sonic has been introduced, distinct from the Fantom Opera network. In an upcoming development, users will have the opportunity to exchange their FTM tokens for "S" tokens at a 1:1 ratio.

news.headline: MARA Holdings, Inc. prices oversubscribed, upsized offering of zero-coupon convertible senior notes due 2031.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.7%. This decrease represents a significant improvement from the previous rate of 4.2%. The data also showed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing the initial expectations of 200,000. Furthermore, the average hourly earnings for workers increased by 3.2% over the last year. These positive figures indicate a robust and thriving labor market, with more opportunities for job seekers and wage growth for workers.

Fastly issues $150 million 7.75% convertible senior notes due 2028 and repurchases portion of 0.00% notes due 2026.
news.summary: Fastly, Inc., a prominent global edge cloud platform leader, unveiled on December 2, 2024, that it has engaged in distinct privately negotiated subscription agreements. As per these agreements, Fastly is set to issue $150.0 million aggregate principal amount of its 7.75% convertible senior notes due 2028, which are referred to as the “2028 Notes.” The gross proceeds anticipated from this issuance are estimated to be $150.0 million. The entirety of this amount, $150.0 million, is slated to be utilized by Fastly for specific purposes.

news.headline: December 2024 starts with record-high stocks. 12/02/2024: The Close.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has reached 5 million worldwide. The death toll has exceeded 300,000, while the number of recovered patients stands at 2.5 million. The United States remains the worst affected country with over 1.5 million cases and 90,000 deaths. In response to the ongoing pandemic, various governments have implemented strict measures to curb the spread of the virus, including lockdowns and social distancing protocols. Researchers are actively working on developing a vaccine, with several clinical trials currently underway. The situation continues to evolve rapidly, with global efforts focused on combating this public health crisis.

Japanese exchange closing after $300M hack, shifts accounts to SBI by Mar 2025.
news.summary: A significant cyberattack has prompted Japanese cryptocurrency exchange DMM Bitcoin to announce the transfer of customer accounts and assets to SBI VC Trade by March 2025. This move comes as a response to the breach that compromised the security of the exchange. The transfer is expected to be completed within the next few years, ensuring the safety of customer funds and information. This decision underscores the importance of safeguarding assets in the face of increasing cyber threats in the crypto industry.

news.headline: Smithfield plans to move some hog farming operations before IPO, with important numbers undisclosed.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate has reached a record low of 3.8%, the lowest since 2000. The economy has added over 250,000 new jobs in the past month, exceeding expectations. This increase has been seen across various sectors, with the manufacturing and healthcare industries showing significant growth. Additionally, the average hourly earnings have risen by 3.2% from the previous year, indicating a positive trend in wage growth. Overall, the current state of the job market suggests a strong and thriving economy.

S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit new highs; AI stock Credo soars 34% on earnings; Apple, Meta, Nvidia in buy zones.
news.summary: Futures for the Dow Jones indicate strong market performance, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq reaching record highs on Monday. Stocks of Apple, Meta, and Nvidia saw significant trading activity, with some nearing their buy zones. Additionally, AI stock Credo surged by an impressive 34% following positive earnings. The market trend seems to be favorable for investors based on these indicators.

LG CNS launching Smart Building DX business in the U.S., incorporating technology into real estate projects using 'Cityhub Building' platform.
news.summary: LG CNS intends to integrate Smart Building Technology into SomeraRoad's real estate projects in the United States in order to elevate their worth. The company will utilize its exclusive 'Cityhub Building' platform to create smart buildings fueled by data. They aim to provide distinctive digital transformation solutions, enhancing the value of the properties.

news.headline: WeTV partners with Magnite to boost video inventory monetization through BidLink solution in SpringServe ad server.
news.summary: Magnite's SpringServe ad server has integrated the BidLink solution to assist WeTV in expanding programmatically. This move is aimed at enhancing efficiency in ad serving and reaching a larger audience. The integration allows for smoother processes and supports WeTV in handling increased programmatic requests. This collaboration between Magnite and WeTV signifies a strategic effort to optimize ad delivery and scalability. The BidLink solution within SpringServe will facilitate this by streamlining operations and improving the overall performance in serving ads. This initiative is vital for WeTV as it scales its programmatic efforts and establishes a stronger presence in the digital advertising space.

news.headline: Japan Display and Innolux form strategic alliance for Eleap
Corpay CFO Tom Panther leaving in March 2025 to join National Christian Foundation. Company searching for new CFO.
news.summary: Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY), a leading global corporate payments firm listed in the S&P 500, disclosed today that its Chief Financial Officer (CFO), Tom Panther, will depart on March 15, 2025, to take on the role of CFO at the National Christian Foundation. The company has begun a search for a replacement CFO. The departure of Panther marks the transition to a Christian ministry role, and Corpay expressed gratitude for his significant contributions. Good wishes were extended to Panther for his future endeavors as the company continues its search for a new CFO.

news.headline: Teck Resources Limited appoints Emma Chapman as new Vice President of Investor Relations, effective Dec 1, 2024. Fraser Phillips to retire in early 2025.
news.summary: Teck Resources Limited, a mining company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, made an announcement on December 2, 2024, regarding the appointment of Emma Chapman as the new Vice President of Investor Relations. Chapman will be taking over this role from Fraser Phillips, who is set to retire in early 2025. Teck Resources Limited is traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbols TECK.A and TECK.B, as well as on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol TECK.
